state.next-action: Phase `18` is still in progress on `18-05`. The shared-section authoring work from `18-01` through `18-04` remains complete, the corrective reusable-metadata migration is in place for live and `_pages_v` tables, the live frontend page acts as the authoring canvas, and the composer now uses a bounded viewport-height shell rail with internal tab scrolling instead of an oversized in-flow sidebar. Resume `18-05`: lightweight restore flows for shared-section versions and page versions without expanding into approvals, scheduling, or diff tooling.
